strategy: Attack with Death, Life, or Myth (+15%); she resists Fire, Ice, and Storm.
Beat her round-4 steal: on every 4th round she steals all positive charms and wards from your team. Stack blades rounds 1-3 and hit before round 4, or set up fresh right after a steal.
Do not Trap her: any trap on her buffs her whole side with +30% damage, +20% accuracy, pierce, and healing. Use blades instead.
She summons a Clockworker round 1; clear it with your hit or ignore it and focus Lucia (only 3,550 health).
Blade up fast and burst her within the first three rounds.
cheatNotes: Late arrivals after round 2 eat a Star Mana Burn that drains pips, so be on time.
She summons a Clockworker on round 1; deal with it via AoE or ignore it and rush Lucia.
Every 4th round she steals every positive charm and ward from your team, so land your hit before round 4.
Trapping her hands her whole side +30% damage, +20% accuracy, +10% pierce, and +30% healing. Never trap her.
